description: Private accounts of Abu Zikri Tabib in the hand of Nahray b. Nissim (Goitein) or Yehuda b. Saadya (Gil). Dating: ca. 1065 (Gil). Draft. Mentions the money that Yehuda b. Sa’adya owed and paid. Yehuda was the Nagid of the Jews in Egypt. He was a doctor but was also involved in the trading business, especially of pearls. Bifolio written on three pages, all crossed out. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, vol. 2, p. 901, and Goitein's index cards)
tags: suftaja, Nahray B. Nissim, 11th c, private, account
description_he: חשבונות פרטיים של אבו זכרי טביב, בכתב ידו של נהראי בן ניסים (לפי גויטיין), כ-1065, על חוב יהודה בן סעדיה הנגיד ועסקי פנינים
